description_long: This is a rectangular, low-profile first-aid kit with beveled edges and a predominantly white exterior. The top surface features a bold red cross and the word 'FIRST AID' in blocky, pixelated red letters, making it highly visible in emergency situations. Two additional red cross symbols are present on the sides, further emphasizing its medical purpose. One end of the kit displays a control panel with green, red, and black buttons or indicators, suggesting electronic functionality or monitoring capability. The surface appears to be made of hard plastic, with a matte finish and minimal surface texture. The overall design is compact and portable, suitable for placement in public urban spaces or vehicles.
description: A compact, white first-aid kit with red cross symbols and a control panel, designed for high visibility and easy access in emergencies.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main red cross, 'FIRST AID' text, and beveled edges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the red cross on the side and partial view of the control panel.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the control panel with colored buttons and indicators.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side red cross and angled view of the control panel.
